testcase.name: tests.test_challenge_api
testcase.error: tests/test_challenge_api.py:8: in <module> class TestChallengeAPI(unittest.TestCase): tests/test_challenge_api.py:11: in TestChallengeAPI api = maproulette.Challenge(config) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ maproulette/api/challenge.py:11: in __init__ super().__init__(configuration=config) maproulette/api/maproulette_server.py:19: in __init__ self.session = aiohttp.ClientSession() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/aiohttp/client.py:318: in __init__ loop = loop or asyncio.get_running_loop() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E RuntimeError: no running event loop

testcase.name: tests.test_server
testcase.error: tests/test_server.py:10: in <module> class TestAPI(unittest.TestCase): tests/test_server.py:13: in TestAPI server = maproulette.MapRouletteServer(configuration=config) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ maproulette/api/maproulette_server.py:19: in __init__ self.session = aiohttp.ClientSession() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/aiohttp/client.py:318: in __init__ loop = loop or asyncio.get_running_loop() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E RuntimeError: no running event loop
